pr.title: Non-record: Depth Recurrence in Parameter-Constrained Transformers — What Works, What Doesn't, and Why

output.summary: Depth-recurrent looped transformer shares a few blocks with per-cycle LoRA adapters, BigramHash, and noisy QAT to tame quantization error amplification under mixed-precision.
techniques: depth recurrence over shared core blocks with cycle-specific adapters
Noisy QAT pairing int8 for recycled weights to limit error amplification
BigramHash contextual embeddings balancing recurrence savings
